inputs.title: Spec: better workflows
inputs.description: Improve workflows so they work better for teams.

context.failureMode: Spec lacks measurable acceptance criteria and verification plan.

rubric.criterion: Reviewer requests changes until acceptance criteria and verification are concrete.
Terminal handoff does not occur while criteria remain subjective.

provenance.source: Failure pattern from vague product-spec drafts.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized failure mode; no single source task id archived.
